name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural খাবার. Very calm and well-maintained animal.

name: Brahman Bull
description: Premium Brahman bull, ideal for 7-share Qurbani. Raised on open farmland with high-quality feed. Certified healthy by local vet.

name: Friesian Cross Bull
description: Well-built Friesian cross breed bull. Heavy weight, great value for shared Qurbani. Fully vaccinated and healthy.

name: Deshi Kalo Bakra
description: Pure Black Bengal goat, one of the most sought-after breeds for Qurbani. Healthy, active, and well-fed on green grass.

name: Jamuna Pari Bakra
description: Large-sized Jamuna Pari goat with impressive build. Very healthy and raised in clean farm conditions. Great choice for single Qurbani.

name: Deshi Dumba
description: Healthy Deshi Dumba sheep, a traditional and popular choice for Qurbani. Raised naturally with proper care and nutrition.

name: Hariana Bull
description: Massive Hariana bull from Pabna, the cattle capital of Bangladesh. Ideal for large family 7-share Qurbani. Vet-certified and fully healthy.

name: Sirohi Bakra
description: Premium Sirohi goat with excellent muscle build. A top-tier choice for individual Qurbani. Raised in hygienic farm with balanced diet.
